title: Meet The Most Successful Female Entrepreneur In ...
Who Owns ABC Supply Company? – Pestel-analysis.com
excerpts:
Section Title: Who Owns ABC Supply Company? > W ho Sits on ABC Supply’s Board?
Content:
As a privately held entity, ABC Supply Company's governance and voting power are concentrated. Diane Hendricks holds the position of Chairman of the Board, a role she assumed following the passing of her husband, Ken Hendricks, in 2007. Her sole ownership of the company vests her with complete control and ultimate decision-making authority.

title: Happy Women's Day 2026: Meet ‘Roofing Queen' Hendricks — world's richest self-made woman's net worth is… | Company Business News
excerpts:
Section Title: ... > **Meet Diane Hendricks**
Content:
**Real Time Net Worth:** $22.3 billion
Diane Hendricks is the cofounder of ABC Supply, one of the largest wholesale distributors of roofing, siding, windows and other select exterior and interior building products, tools, and related supplies in the US.
According to *Bloomberg* , the Beloit, Wisconsin-based company sells shingles, soffits and gutters, and had sales revenue of $20.7 billion in 2024.
**Also Read** | Happy Women's Day 2026 wishes: WhatsApp, Instagram GIFs, images to make her day
According to *Forbes* , she cofounded the business with her late husband, Ken, in Beloit, [Wisconsin](https://www.livemint.com/topic/wisconsin/page-1) , in 1982. She has chaired the company since Ken's death in 2007, and became ABC's sole owner in 2013.
In 2008, Diane formed Diane M. Hendricks Enterprises, Inc. ("DMHE") to serve as the parent company for ABC, HHC and other Hendricks investments.

Content:
Kenneth A. Hendricks and Diane M. Hendricks cofounded ABC Supply in 1982 in Beloit, Wisconsin; both brought contracting and building-materials experience.

title: Diane M. Hendricks
excerpts:
Section Title: Corporate Officers > Diane M. Hendricks > Founder
Content:
Diane M. Hendricks co-founded building products distributor ABC Supply Co., Inc. with her late husband Kenneth Hendricks in 1982. Diane and Ken also founded Hendricks Holding Co., Inc. which presides over a diverse portfolio of businesses including manufacturing, distribution, real estate development, construction, recycling and life sciences.
ABC is the largest distributor of roofing materials in North America and a leading distributor of siding, windows, gutter, wallboard, metal framing and ceiling tiles. ABC has earned 18 Gallup Exceptional Workplace Awards and two Glassdoor Employees’ Choice Awards for Best Places to Work for its commitment to creating an employee-first, engaging culture.
Diane considers her patriotic and conservative values of high importance and is passionate about civic responsibility. Her primary efforts are focused in Beloit, Wisconsin, where ABC and HHC are headquartered.

title: About Us | Hendricks Holding Co., Inc ...
excerpts:
Section Title: We honor our entrepreneurial roots by supporting companies that embrace the American dream, belie...
Content:
In 2001, Diane and Ken established Hendricks Holding Company, Inc. HHC is a continuation of Diane and Ken's dreams and a representation of their combined visions. The businesses and associates share a passion for Diane and Ken's values to pursue the American dream. The core values include respect, opportunity, work hard - have fun, entrepreneurial spirit, family, give back, and American pride.
In 2007, Diane lost her husband, Ken, in a tragic accident. Despite this tragedy, Diane has continued to dream big as Chairman of ABC Supply and Hendricks Holding Company, Inc., roles she held until stepping down in 2024.
​
In 2008, Diane formed Diane M. Hendricks Enterprises, Inc. ("DMHE") to serve as the parent company for ABC, HHC and other Hendricks investments. In 2025, HHC was merged into DMHE, and DMHE renamed itself as Hendricks Holding Company, Inc.
